Footer.company_desc: L1 protocol for crypto-bank payments & asset recovery. Uses AI to boost scalability and security.
Footer.certification_desc: Lenix Protocol is ISO27001 certified. This demonstrates how, as a business, we securely manage information assets and data to an internationally recognised standard. Additionally, it shows our robust approach for managing assets such as client data and employee details, intellectual property, financial information and third-party data.

Hero.subtitle1: Advanced blockchain analytics and forensic investigations to trace assets, uncover fraud, and support legal recovery efforts globally.
Hero.subtitle2: Secure your digital future with expert investigation.
Hero.card_info: Powered by Stripe. Amount charged in USD.

Pillars.subtitle: Choose what you need—each pillar links to dedicated solutions.

security.title: Blockchain Security
security.desc: Audited infrastructure and secure vault technology to protect your assets.

recovery.title: Asset Recovery
recovery.desc: Specialized protocols and legal pathways to reclaim lost or stolen crypto with certified forensic analysis.

forensics.title: Blockchain Forensics
forensics.desc: Expert investigation to trace fraud, hacks, and provide court-admissible evidence for legal recovery.

finance.title: Financial Service Protocol
finance.desc: Payments, lending, wallet, and vault for the modern crypto ecosystem.

Comparison.subtitle: Others specialize in one area. We combine security, recovery, forensics, and finance so you don’t have to juggle multiple providers.

Merchant.point1: Accept crypto and settle in fiat. Straightforward checkout and API for merchants.
Merchant.point2: Hold proceeds in our secure vault with multi-sig and custody—audited infrastructure.
Merchant.point3: If funds are lost or stolen, our team can help trace and reclaim through recovery and legal channels.

Payment.title: The Protocol for Payments, vault, recovery, and lending
Payment.subtitle: One stack for how you move, hold, and recover value.

fiat.title: Crypto-to-fiat
fiat.desc: Send crypto and settle in fiat via local payment networks—cross-border and everyday.

vault.title: Vault and custody
vault.desc: Multi-sig and secure custody so your assets stay protected.

recovery.title: Recovery and forensics
recovery.desc: When things go wrong, we help trace and reclaim funds.

lending.title: Lending
lending.desc: Borrow against collateral and access liquidity when you need it.

Features.title_big: Bridging crypto with local payment networks globally.
Features.desc1: Lenix ProtocolPay empowers crypto holders and businesses to facilitate crypto-to-fiat transactions worldwide, leveraging local payment networks and blockchain technology.
Features.desc2: At last, enjoy the speed of crypto with the everyday convenience of fiat payments.
